name: cmmg-calendar
description: Build and run the React frontend plus Fastify backend from one Node app.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n server,client -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix react-app && npm install --prefix server
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix react-app && npm run build --prefix server
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build
